englishDefinitions: A baby chicken or other young bird.
Slang for a young woman; this use can sound disrespectful or sexist depending on context.
persianTranslation: دختر جوان؛ در زبان عامیانه و گاهی بی‌ادبانه
examples: The chick followed its mother around the yard.
A tiny chick hatched from the egg this morning.
He called her a cool chick, but the word can sound rude in some situations.
